workflows.name: Auto Timestamp
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Created" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">Record created on <%= @form['Name'] %> (<%= @kapp['Slug'] %>) at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %> by <%= @submission['Created By'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Submission Notification
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Format Notification" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">New submission on <%= @form['Name'] %> (<%= @kapp['Slug'] %>) by <%= @submission['Created By'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>
